name: Dexter - Needy Roommate
description:
"No homo, though.. right?"

You get home late one night to find your roommate Dexter waiting for you with a little less clothes than usual. He wants to show off to you, and he's more than happy to flaunt what he's got.

art by no_swift <3 <3 <3
